name: return-prevention-skill
description: Predict return risk for individual orders and generate proactive interventions to prevent returns before they happen.
author: alphaparkinc

order.description: Order details: order_id, product_category, order_value, days_since_purchase, shipping_days, customer_segment.

customer.description: Customer history: past_returns, past_orders, return_rate, satisfaction_score.

product.description: Product attributes: size_sensitive, fragile, high_price, new_product, complex_setup.

risk_factors.description: Identified risk factors driving the score.
